_doc: Pi-pinned snapshot of 9 RPC commands wired in Sprint 6h₂ (Phase 4.9). Used by tests/pi_parity/test_phase_4_9_strict_superset.py.
_w6_p_258_note: Sprint 6h₂ W6 (P-258 BLOCKING): W1 spec drafted line ranges 528-635 from a stale grep; W5 audit at SHA 734e08e confirmed the 9 case sites in rpc-mode.ts live at 483-547 and delegate to AgentSession methods in coding-agent/src/core/agent-session.ts. Each entry below cites BOTH the case site (rpc-mode.ts line range) and the session method (agent-session.ts line range).

cycle_thinking_level.body: const level = session.cycleThinkingLevel(); if (!level) return success(id, 'cycle_thinking_level', null); return success(id, 'cycle_thinking_level', { level });

aelix_state_surface_gaps.harness_steer_signature: exists at core.py:897 as `steer(text)` — Sprint 6h₂ adds `images: list[ImageContent] | None = None`
aelix_state_surface_gaps.harness_follow_up_signature: exists at core.py:906 as `follow_up(text)` — Sprint 6h₂ adds `images`
aelix_state_surface_gaps.harness_set_thinking_level: exists at core.py:1285 — Sprint 6h₂ uses for cycle_thinking_level
aelix_state_surface_gaps.harness_steering_mode_property: exists at core.py:689 (read-only) — Sprint 6h₂ adds `set_steering_mode(mode)` setter
aelix_state_surface_gaps.harness_follow_up_mode_property: exists at core.py:697 (read-only) — Sprint 6h₂ adds `set_follow_up_mode(mode)` setter
aelix_state_surface_gaps.auto_compaction_state_field: MISSING — Sprint 6h₂ adds `_state.auto_compaction_enabled: bool = True` (Pi default per fixture pi_rpc_mode_734e08e.json:rpc_session_state_shape.auto_compaction_enabled)
aelix_state_surface_gaps.abort_retry_machinery: MISSING — Sprint 6h₂ adds `_retry_aborted: bool` flag + `harness.abort_retry()`; Pi's retry loop is in `agent-harness.ts` event loop; Aelix harness has no retry loop yet, so abort_retry is a no-op-but-state-aware setter (sets flag for future Sprint 6h₃/4 retry-loop port)
aelix_state_surface_gaps.abort_bash_cancellation_token: MISSING — Sprint 6h₂ adds a process-cancel hook on the inflight bash operation (Sprint 5b bash tool needs token threading)

cycle_thinking_level_algorithm._doc: Pi `session.cycleThinkingLevel()` rotates through the model's supported levels. Returns null when model lacks reasoning support (only 'off' supported).
pi_algorithm: 2. if len(levels) <= 1: return null (nothing to cycle)
4. idx = levels.index(current) if current in levels else 0

deferred_to_sprint_6h_3: 5 session tree commands (switch_session / fork / clone / get_fork_messages / get_last_assistant_text)
Pi `agent-harness.ts` retry loop port (currently `abort_retry` is a state-flag setter only)
Pi `bash-executor` cancellation token threading (currently `abort_bash` is best-effort + state-flag)
